  C40EA6: F8              .BYTE $F8 ;Y Position, relative to sprite
  C40EA7: 6A 63           .WORD $236A | ORIENTATION::HORIZONTAL
  C40EA9: F0              .BYTE $F0 ;X Position, relative to sprite
  C40EAA: 00              .BYTE $00
  C40EAB: F8              .BYTE $F8 ;Y Position, relative to sprite
  C40EAC: 68 63           .WORD $2368 | ORIENTATION::HORIZONTAL
  C40EAE: 00              .BYTE $00 ;X Position, relative to sprite
  C40EAF: 80              .BYTE $80
  C40EB0:             ; Format:
  C40EB0:             ; 00XX YYYY
  C40EB0:             ; Valid XX:
  C40EB0:             ;   01 = Show frame described at $YYYY ($0000 for nothing)
  C40EB0:             ;   02 = Wait YYYY frames
  C40EB0:             ;   03 = Jump to $YYYY
  C40EB0:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING:
  C40EB0: 01 00 42 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_1)
  C40EB4: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40EB8: 01 00 4C 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_2)
  C40EBC: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40EC0: 01 00 00 00     SHOWFRAME $0000
  C40EC4: 02 00 10 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0010
  C40EC8: 01 00 56 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_3)
  C40ECC: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40ED0: 01 00 60 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_4)
  C40ED4: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40ED8: 01 00 00 00     SHOWFRAME $0000
  C40EDC: 02 00 10 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0010
  C40EE0: 03 00 B0 0E     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING)
  C40EE4:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_MUSHROOMIZED:
  C40EE4: 01 00 6A 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_MUSHROOMIZED_FRAME_1)
  C40EE8: 02 00 FF 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $00FF
  C40EEC: 03 00 E4 0E     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_MUSHROOMIZED)
  C40EF0:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE:
  C40EF0: 01 00 74 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE_FRAME_1)
  C40EF4: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40EF8: 01 00 7E 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE_FRAME_2)
  C40EFC: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40F00: 03 00 F0 0E     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE)
  C40F04:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE:
  C40F04: 01 00 88 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE_FRAME_1)
  C40F08: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40F0C: 01 00 9C 0E     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE_FRAME_2)
  C40F10: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40F14: 03 00 04 0F     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE)

  C45637:             FIND_ITEM_IN_INVENTORY:
  C45637: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION
  C45639:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C45639:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C45639:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;int
  C45639:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;int
  C45639:                 STACK_RESERVE_RETURN_INT16 ;bool
  C45639: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          F0 FF 5B 68 
  C45641: 86 04           STX @VIRTUAL04
  C45643: AA              TAX
  C45644: 3A              DEC
  C45645: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C45647: A9 00 00        LDA #0
  C4564A: 85 02           STA @VIRTUAL02
  C4564C: 80 22           BRA @UNKNOWN2
  C4564E:             @UNKNOWN0:
  C4564E: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C45650: A0 5F 00        LDY #.SIZEOF(char_struct)
  C45653: 22 F7 8F C0     JSL MULT168
  C45657: 18              CLC
  C45658: 69 F1 99        ADC #.LOWORD(PARTY_CHARACTERS) + char_struct::items
  C4565B: 18              CLC
  C4565C: 65 02           ADC @VIRTUAL02
  C4565E: AA              TAX
  C4565F: BD 00 00        LDA __BSS_START__,X
  C45662: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C45665: C5 04           CMP @VIRTUAL04
  C45667: D0 05           BNE @UNKNOWN1
  C45669: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C4566B: 1A              INC
  C4566C: 80 13           BRA @UNKNOWN5
  C4566E:             @UNKNOWN1:
  C4566E: E6 02           INC @VIRTUAL02
  C45670:             @UNKNOWN2:
  C45670: A9 0E 00        LDA #.SIZEOF(char_struct::items)
  C45673: 18              CLC
  C45674: E5 02           SBC @VIRTUAL02
  C45676: 70 04 10 D4     BRANCHGTS @UNKNOWN0
          80 02 30 D0 
  C4567E: A9 00 00        LDA #FALSE
  C45681:             @UNKNOWN5:
  C45681: 2B 60           END_C_FUNCTION
